title: Add 1280px + 1440px Breakpoints
description: Consolidated 15 ad-hoc breakpoints (900px, 600px, 500px, 1400px) to clean 5-tier system: 1440px, 1280px, 1024px, 768px, 480px. Zero ad-hoc breakpoints remain.
